text:
……ちょっとずつ見えてきたぞ。
コイツ、巨体の割に脚が細い！
どれか１本を集中攻撃してみようぜ！

...I think I figured out our approach.
It has pretty thin legs for such a giant body.
So let's try focusing our attacks on one of
the legs!

/ci1 2 ……ちょっとずつ見えてきたぞ。
コイツ、巨体の割に脚が細い！
どれか１本を集中攻撃してみようぜ！
脚部を破壊し、ダウン中に後頭部の弱点を狙え！

/ci1 2 ...I think I figured out our approach.
It has pretty thin legs for such a giant body.
So let's try focusing our attacks on one of
the legs!

Destroy its legs, then aim for the weak spot on
the back of its head while its downed!
